title: alyssum gemonense subsp. petraeum
intro: Alyssum gemonense subsp. petraeum, also known as rock alyssum, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, rock alyssum has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
